payload.prompt: /patch Issue #2: Test coverage omits plans-education and plans-students variants and three trial IDs (start-free-trial, fourteen-day-trial, thirty-day-trial), leaving the Set membership unvalidated by tests. Resolution: Add test cases for the missing variants and trial analytics IDs to fully cover the PLANS_VARIANTS and FREE_TRIAL_CTA_IDS constants. Severity: tech_debt
